title: Basic landing page
prd: Build a landing page for a productivity app called FocusFlow. Include hero, benefits, and signup CTA.

title: Minimal feature set
prd: Create a tiny to-do app with one screen showing task list and add task input.

title: Dashboard UI
prd: Analytics dashboard for support team with ticket volume, SLA trends, queue table, and assignee activity.

title: Multi-section workspace
prd: Project workspace with roadmap, sprint board, release checklist, and risks panel.

title: Full onboarding and trial conversion
prd: End-to-end onboarding flow for B2B SaaS: invite team, connect integrations, configure alerts, and upgrade from trial.

title: Dense enterprise PRD
prd: Enterprise procurement platform with RBAC, approval chains, vendor scorecards, contract milestones, compliance checks, and audit trail reporting.

title: Overloaded input
prd: One platform for CRM + ERP + HRIS + BI + CMS + help desk + AI assistant + billing + warehouse management with every possible feature.
